must_do.full_text:
We're launching Claude Tag today. Tag Claude into Slack and it works in channel with you. It’s proactive, multiplayer, with its own identity and memory.

But it’s not just a bot in Slack. Over the last few months, it’s totally changed how we use Claude
must_do.summary: Anthropic推出Claude Tag，可在Slack中直接调用，具备记忆和多人协作能力。改变团队协作方式。
angles: Claude Tag发布：Slack里的AI助手革命
多人协作新时代，Claude如何改变团队工作
从工具到队友：Claude的身份升级

must_do.full_text: 🚨 Ex-OpenAI researcher Shyamal Anadkat returns to India to build superintelligence, calling it a "once-in-a-generation opportunity" for the country's AI ecosystem. https://t.co/GzIFEfUX0x

must_do.full_text:

must_do.full_text: Nvidia, $NVDA, has announced a warm-water cooling system that it says can dramatically reduce the amount of water a data center uses, eliminating “pretty much all water usage” inside the data center.
must_do.summary: 英伟达推出温水冷却系统，可将数据中心水耗降至接近零。这是AI基础设施的重要突破，解决了大规模AI训练的环保痛点。
angles: 英伟达黑科技：数据中心用水量降至零

- GPT-5.6 has been delayed and will no longer release this week. New target is ~mid-July.

must_do.full_text:
if you're running codex CLI, go check this path right now:

~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite
~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite-wal
~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite-shm

since february, codex has been writing every single websocket event and telemetry trace to a local SQLite database at TRACE level. estimated https://t.co/ybi2S6EjLp
must_do.summary: Codex CLI 自 2 月起在本地 SQLite 数据库记录所有 websocket 事件和遥测数据（TRACE 级别）。隐私/安全问题曝光。
angles: Codex 暗中记录所有数据，2月以来从未停止
你的 Codex 在偷偷写日志，快检查这个路径
开发者必看：Codex 隐藏的数据收集真相

priority.full_text:
Claude Code automatically adds itself to the commit metadata "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus <noreply@anthropic.com>".

I strongly disagree with crediting Claude as a commit co-author. It is a tool I'm paying for, not a copyright holder, not an author. We don't credit Visual Studio. https://t.co/BO2K6EmtIY
priority.summary: 开发者质疑Claude Code自动在提交元数据中署名为共同作者，认为AI是工具而非作者。涉及AI伦理和开发者权益的观点。
angles: Claude Code署名风波：AI该不该成为代码作者
开发者怒了：我为什么反对AI共同署名
工具vs作者：AI时代的版权困境
